objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: AssetPack is the packaged technical knowledge commodity traded by Bitcode, never raw source or a loose file bundle.
objectRows.btdPosture: may carry deposit-time potential before Need selection and final Need-relative BTD after quote/finality gates
objectRows.btcPosture: quoteable only after reviewed Need, selected Fit set, and source-safe synthesis evidence
objectRows.sourceVisibility: source-safe preview before settlement; entitled source delivery only after BTD rights transfer

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Deposit option is a proposed source-safe AssetPack candidate for depositor review, not final BTD or public source disclosure.
objectRows.btdPosture: BTD potential only; no final Need-relative scalar volume
objectRows.btcPosture: no quote, payment, or compensation claim
objectRows.sourceVisibility: depositor-reviewed source-safe measurements and protected-source custody roots

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Depository AssetPack is approved searchable supply with source-safe measurements, embeddings, provenance, and protected-source roots.
objectRows.btdPosture: candidate contribution remains provisional until selected against a reviewed Need
objectRows.btcPosture: not directly paid; participates in Need-Fit quote and source-to-shares after settlement
objectRows.sourceVisibility: candidate identity and provenance may be previewed source-safely; protected source stays withheld

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Read Request is buyer demand input that may synthesize a reviewed Need but is not itself a Need, Fit, quote, or BTD.
objectRows.btdPosture: BTD not applicable until Need-Fit measurement exists
objectRows.sourceVisibility: private read context remains scoped to the Reading boundary

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Reviewed Need is the accepted buyer objective that authorizes Finding Fits and Need-relative measurement.
objectRows.btdPosture: admits Need-relative measurement but does not by itself compute final BTD
objectRows.btcPosture: quote preparation still blocked until Fits and synthesis exist
objectRows.sourceVisibility: Need is visible to the Reader and source-safe to operators according to policy

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Finding Fits receipt proves depository search, ranking, thresholding, and provenance for one or many candidate Fits.
objectRows.btdPosture: candidate BTD contribution remains provisional until the selected Fit set is synthesized into a Need-Fit AssetPack
objectRows.sourceVisibility: candidate source is withheld; ranking and provenance roots are source-safe

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Selected Fit set is the one-or-many admitted Depository AssetPack set accepted for Need-Fit synthesis.
objectRows.btdPosture: required input to final Need-relative BTD calculation
objectRows.sourceVisibility: provenance is source-safe; underlying source remains withheld

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Need-Fit AssetPack is a new Need-relative AssetPack synthesized from the reviewed Need and selected Fit set.
objectRows.btdPosture: final BTD scalar volume can be computed for quote and becomes rights-bearing only after settlement
objectRows.btcPosture: quoteable, payable, and deliverable through BTC finality gates
objectRows.sourceVisibility: source-bearing bundle is withheld until rights transfer and repository delivery

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Preview is a source-safe explanation of measurements, quality, provenance, and quote readiness, not the AssetPack source.
objectRows.btdPosture: may show BTD volume/range posture source-safely
objectRows.btcPosture: may show quote readiness but not payment finality
objectRows.sourceVisibility: never contains protected source, unpaid AssetPack source, or source snippets

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: BTD scalar volume receipt records Need-relative weighted technical knowledge volume with deterministic measurement policy.
objectRows.btdPosture: BTD volume is quote-bound before settlement and rights-bearing only after finality
objectRows.sourceVisibility: measurement roots and formulas are source-safe; protected source is not serialized

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: BTC quote is a deterministic sats offer bound to BTD volume, policy, expiry, wallet authority, and proof roots.
objectRows.btdPosture: quote-bound BTD only; rights are unpaid and untransferred
objectRows.btcPosture: quote is not payment or final settlement
objectRows.sourceVisibility: quote is source-safe and carries no wallet private material

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: BTC settlement receipt distinguishes quote, PSBT, broadcast, observation, finality, mismatch, repair, refund, and finalized settlement.
objectRows.btdPosture: authorizes BTD rights transfer only after finality and reconciliation
objectRows.btcPosture: BTC is settlement truth after finality and conservation readback
objectRows.sourceVisibility: private settlement payloads and wallet private material are never serialized

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: BTD rights receipt proves settled rights, source unlock authority, and ownership/read/use boundary for the paying Reader.
objectRows.btdPosture: rights-bearing BTD after BTC finality and transfer receipt
objectRows.sourceVisibility: source unlock is authorized only to the entitled Reader boundary

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Delivery receipt proves repository handoff of the source-bearing AssetPack only after settlement and rights transfer.
objectRows.btdPosture: delivery is authorized by rights-bearing BTD
objectRows.sourceVisibility: full source is visible only inside the entitled repository or delivery boundary

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Source-to-shares allocation routes post-finality contributor compensation from selected Fits and BTD range slices.
objectRows.btdPosture: uses settled BTD range slices as allocation context, not BTD size calculation
objectRows.btcPosture: depends on finalized BTC settlement and conservation
objectRows.sourceVisibility: allocation statements are source-safe and do not expose underlying source

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Contributor compensation statement is source-safe post-finality readback of BTC compensation routing and reconciliation posture.
objectRows.btcPosture: post-finality compensation or repair state only

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Proof root identifies the evidence required to advance or explain state without serializing hidden payloads.
objectRows.btdPosture: proof can support BTD measurement, quote, rights, and repair but is not BTD itself
objectRows.btcPosture: proof can support quote, observation, finality, and reconciliation but is not payment
objectRows.sourceVisibility: root hashes and evidence classes are source-safe unless entitled storage unlock exists

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Repair case blocks advancement when evidence is missing, stale, contradictory, or policy-invalid.
objectRows.btdPosture: BTD rights, source unlock, allocation, or quote state remains blocked until repair closes
objectRows.btcPosture: payment, refund, escalation, or compensation remains fail-closed until readback agrees
objectRows.sourceVisibility: failure class and proof roots only; no protected payload exposure

objectRows.sourceSafeMeaning: Interface claim is any public, product, API, MCP, ChatGPT App, Bitcode Chat, telemetry, or operator statement about protocol state.
objectRows.btdPosture: must label whether BTD is potential, quote-bound, rights-pending, rights-transferred, allocation context, or repair
objectRows.btcPosture: must label whether BTC is quote, accepted quote, observed payment, finality, finalized settlement, compensation, refund, or repair
objectRows.sourceVisibility: claim projections must default to the narrowest source-safe disclosure boundary

claimRows.statement: AssetPack is the traded commodity and raw source is never the public commodity.
BTD is Need-relative weighted scalar knowledge-volume whose settled form carries rights, source unlock authority, and allocation context.
Deposit option may describe BTD potential, coverage, utility, criticality, and search posture but cannot claim final BTD or payment.
Operator evidence may expose proof roots, state labels, repair blockers, and readback posture, but not hidden source or private payloads.
Preview may expose measurements, quality, provenance, BTD posture, quote readiness, and proof roots, but not unpaid AssetPack source.
BTC quote is a deterministic source-safe offer bound to reviewed Need, selected Fits, BTD volume, policy, network, expiry, and authority.
Prepared, signed, broadcast, and observed BTC payment states cannot unlock source, transfer BTD rights, deliver, or compensate contributors.
Confirmed BTC finality plus reconciliation authorizes BTD rights transfer, source unlock, and repository delivery to the entitled Reader.
Repository delivery is the entitled source-unlock boundary after BTC finality and BTD rights transfer, not a preview state.
Contributor compensation follows final settlement, source-to-shares allocation, BTD range slices, and reconciliation readback.
Telemetry can explain progress and repair blockers, but cannot alone advance AssetPack lifecycle, BTC settlement, BTD rights, or delivery.
Investor and landing-page framing may explain Bitcode commercially, but formal protocol law comes only from the canonical specification family and proof readback.
Missing, stale, contradictory, or policy-invalid evidence returns the object or claim to repair-required and the narrowest source-safe boundary.

closureReading: V46 Gate 2 closes the source-safe comprehension object model and claim taxonomy; it does not authorize runtime behavior or V46 promotion.
